---
title: "Gemini CLI — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos 4 parquets do parser canonico v3 (CLI local)"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from itables import init_notebook_mode

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import setup_views_with_manual
PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Gemini CLI"
con = duckdb.connect()
_views = setup_views_with_manual(
    con, "gemini_cli", PROCESSED,
    ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"],
)

# Google CLI palette: azul escuro
SOURCE_COLOR = "#1A56DB"
SECONDARY = "#1E40AF"
ACCENT = "#60A5FA"
MUTED = "#DBEAFE"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df):
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    if orientation == "h":
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
    else:
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color))
    fig.update_layout(
        title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches
""").df()

range_dt = con.execute("""
    SELECT MIN(created_at) AS oldest, MAX(created_at) AS newest_created
    FROM conversations
""").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}",
     "Periodo": f"{range_dt['oldest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d} → {range_dt['newest_created'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
]))
```

> **Sobre este documento.** Catalogo descritivo dos 4 parquets do Gemini CLI,
> capturados via cópia incremental de `~/.gemini/tmp/`. Source: `gemini_cli`,
> mode: `cli`. Schema: JSON (nao JSONL como Claude Code/Codex). `thoughts`
> array → thinking formatado. `toolCalls` correlacionados via status.

# 1. Cobertura

## 1.1 Cobertura de tools

```{python}
#| label: tools-coverage

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS sessions_with_tools,
           (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS total_sessions
    FROM tool_events
""").df()
print(f"Sessions com tools: {fmt_pct(int(cov['sessions_with_tools'].iloc[0]), int(cov['total_sessions'].iloc[0]))}")

cov_th = con.execute("""
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS with_thinking FROM messages
    WHERE thinking IS NOT NULL AND role = 'assistant'
""").df().iloc[0, 0]
total_asst = con.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE role = 'assistant'").df().iloc[0, 0]
print(f"Assistant msgs com thinking: {fmt_pct(int(cov_th), int(total_asst))}")
```

# 2. Volumes

## 2.1 Timeline de criacao

```{python}
#| label: timeline

months = con.execute("""
    SELECT date_trunc('month', created_at) AS month, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM conversations WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
""").df()

if len(months):
    fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=months["month"], y=months["count"], marker_color=SOURCE_COLOR))
    fig.update_layout(
        title="Sessions Gemini CLI criadas por mes",
        height=350, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
        xaxis_title=None, yaxis_title="Sessions",
    )
    fig.show()
```

## 2.2 Top sessions por mensagens

```{python}
#| label: top-sessions

top = con.execute("""
    SELECT conversation_id, message_count, project, model
    FROM conversations
    ORDER BY message_count DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()
show_df(top)
```

# 3. Tool events (deep dive)

## 3.1 Top tools

```{python}
#| label: top-tools

top_tools = con.execute("""
    SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS calls,
           SUM(CASE WHEN success THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count,
           SUM(CASE WHEN success = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_count
    FROM tool_events
    WHERE tool_name IS NOT NULL AND tool_name != ''
    GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 15
""").df()

if len(top_tools):
    show_df(top_tools)
    fig = plotly_bar(
        top_tools["tool_name"].tolist()[::-1],
        top_tools["calls"].tolist()[::-1],
        f"Top {len(top_tools)} tools por chamadas",
        color=SOURCE_COLOR, orientation="h", height=450,
    )
    fig.show()
```

## 3.2 Success rate

```{python}
#| label: success-rate

stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN success THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN success = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN success IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unknown_count,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM tool_events
""").df().iloc[0]

print(f"Success: {fmt_pct(int(stats['success_count']), int(stats['total']))}")
print(f"Error:   {fmt_pct(int(stats['error_count']), int(stats['total']))}")
print(f"Unknown: {fmt_pct(int(stats['unknown_count']), int(stats['total']))}")
```

# 4. Projects

```{python}
#| label: projects

projects = con.execute("""
    SELECT project, COUNT(*) AS sessions, SUM(message_count) AS total_msgs
    FROM conversations
    WHERE project IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY project ORDER BY sessions DESC LIMIT 20
""").df()
show_df(projects)
```

# 5. Modelos usados

```{python}
#| label: models

models = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS msg_count,
           COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS sessions
    FROM messages WHERE model IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY model ORDER BY msg_count DESC
""").df()
show_df(models)
```

---

**Render:** `QUARTO_PYTHON="$(pwd)/.venv/bin/python" quarto render notebooks/gemini-cli.qmd`
